title: Cubic Sun & Moon
description: Recreates the Sun and the Moon in 3D and is compatible with mods that add sky features.
body:
[](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cubic-sun-moon-bedrock/) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cubic-sun-moon/) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cubic-sun-amp-moon-v1-2/) [](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7BiNDV1kaK5ehVzNA8wKPA) [](https://www.reddit.com/user/TheJoeFly/)

Have you ever looked at the Moon and thought: "Why isn't it also a cube?"
Well, if that's the case, then this resource pack is perfect for you! It recreates the Sun and the Moon in 3D! ## Features - 3D Moon texture with 8 phases - 3D Sun texture - 1 painting retextured - Support for all Minecraft versions (including Alpha and Beta) - Support for various mods, such as: - Ad Astra - Astrocraft - Galacticraft - Stellar View
How to Download **For Java Edition:** 1. Download the most recent version. 2. Open Minecraft and go to Options > Resource Packs / Texture Packs > Open Pack Folder. 3. Copy/Cut and Paste the downloaded file there. 4. Activate the Resource Pack.
Note: If it appears as Incompatible, don't worry, it should work.
**For Bedrock Edition:** - [Check it out on Planet Minecraft]([https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cubic-sun-moon-bedrock/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cubic-sun-moon-bedrock/))
Compatibility ### Minecraft versions This resource pack supports all Minecraft versions that allow texture/resource packs to be used, from Alpha 1.2.2 to the most recent version. It also includes textures for April Fools updates.
### Shaders As long as the shader does not change the Sun and Moon texture or has an option to switch the Sun/Moon style, it should work with this resource pack. For instance, these shaders work: - BSL Shaders - Complementary Shaders ![with_shaders](https://i.postimg.cc/wjCKYcST/sun-moon-shaders.png)
### Mods It is also compatible with a few mods that add sky features, such as planets and moons: - [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) by Terrarium - [Astrocraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/astrocraft) by pymsrps - [Galacticraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/galacticraft-legacy) by TeamGalacticraft - [Stellar View](https://modrinth.com/mod/stellarview) by Povstalec - Any mod that uses the Vanilla texture. Make sure Cubic Sun & Moon is above Mod resources on the Selected Resource Packs:
FAQ **Are you going to support more mods?**
Probably. If you have a suggestion of a mod this resource pack could support, add a comment on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cubic-sun-moon/comments), [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cubic-sun-amp-moon-v1-2/) or [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-baRKiV6EW0). **Can I use this resource pack in my modpack/server?**
Yes, you can use it in your Modrinth modpack or server. If your server is public, you have to credit me somewhere in the server or website of the server. **Can I make posts/videos using this resource pack on social medias?**
Yes. If this resource pack is the main or one of the subjects of your post/video, you have to credit me and/or include a direct link to this page. Please do not distribute modified versions.
Credits **Thanks to:**
- blaholtzen, for the original ideia. [Check it out!](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/isometric-moon-cube/)
- NASA, for the [CGI Moon Kit](https://svs.gsfc.nasa.gov/cgi-bin/details.cgi?aid=4720).

Enjoy! :)
